initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    Player.player_api_id,
    Player.birthday,
    Player_Attributes.date,
    CAST((julianday(Player_Attributes.date) - julianday(Player.birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age
FROM 
    Player
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes 
ON 
    Player.player_api_id = Player_Attributes.player_api_id
WHERE 
    Player_Attributes.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND Player_Attributes.date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2015-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    Player.player_api_id, Player.birthday, Player_Attributes.date;

SELECT 
    Player.player_name,
    CAST((strftime('%Y', Player_Attributes.date) AS INTEGER) - strftime('%Y', Player.birthday) AS INTEGER) AS age
FROM 
    Player
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes ON Player.player_api_id = Player_Attributes.player_api_id
WHERE 
    Player_Attributes.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND Player_Attributes.date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2015-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    Player.player_api_id, Player.birthday, Player_Attributes.date;

SELECT 
    Player.player_api_id,

    Player_Attributes.date,
    CAST((julianday(Player_Attributes.date) - julianday(Player.birthday)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) AS age

    AND Player_Attributes.date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2015-12-31'
GROUP BY
